highlights: Collab ledgers created only in metaswarm; touched via open(path,'a').close() (bin/stampede.sh:671-683).
No adoptions.jsonl; adoption represented only in bundle.json/final result.
Monitor counts via wc -l (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:32-38), no JSON parsing.
Merger does not consume collab ledgers (agents/stampede-merger.agent.md:49-53).
child-agents.jsonl initialized with mode 'w' at bin/stampede.sh:853-860 (truncation hazard on relaunch).

evidence.note: metaswarm-only mkdir of commanders/ and collab/.
ledger touch creation, robust on repeated launches.
workflow includes 'adopt' but ledger_events excludes adoptions.
adoption recorded inline in bundle.json + final result.
counts 5 ledgers via wc -l; no adopt count.
child-agents.jsonl opened with 'w' on fleet seed.

gaps: No JSON validation in monitor; malformed lines counted.
No flock/umask/chmod policy; concurrency relies on O_APPEND guidance.
child-agents.jsonl 'w' init is a truncation hazard on relaunch.
recommendations: Add optional JSONL validator/tail-error reporting in monitor.
Use append-only helper or flock for multi-writer appends.
Switch child-agents.jsonl init from 'w' to 'a' or rotate before re-init.
Have merger consume collab ledgers as part of synthesis.
